meaning: Ha Meem (special letters at the start of this chapter)
indeed we (subject of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
we sent it down (object of إِنَّا)
indeed we (subject of أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
in it (referring to لَيْلَة 'night' which is feminine)
a matter (object of يُفْرَقُ - is decided/distinguished)
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The All-Hearing (attribute of اللَّهِ, paired with ٱلْعَلِيمُ)
the heavens (possessed by رَبِّ - Lord of)
and the earth (possessed by/connected to رَبِّ - Lord of)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ and ٱلْأَرْضِ)
if (introduces condition for كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ - if you are certain)
those who are completely sure (acted on by إِن)
except/but (excluding anything other than هُوَ as god)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
he gives life to (paired with وَيُمِيتُ - and he causes death)
and he causes death (connected to يُحْىِۦ - gives life)
and Lord (connected to رَبُّكُمْ - your Lord - from previous ayah)
But rather (contradicting what came before and introducing هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ)
so wait watchfully! (connected to يَوْمَ تَأْتِى)
O our Lord! (calling out to اكْشِفْ)
How can it be? From where? (expressing disbelief about الذِّكْرَىٰ)
the remembrance (that they were warned about)
and certainly (connects to جَآءَهُمْ - came to them)
he came to them (object of came)
clearly evident, very clear (describing رَسُولٌ - a messenger)
then (connects to تَوَلَّوْا - they turned away)
they turned away (from عَنْهُ - from him)
and they said (subject of مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ)
one who is taught (object of قَالُوا - they said)
we are the removers (subject of إِنَّا)
the punishment (object of كاشفوا - we will remove)
for a little while (object of كَاشِفُوا/removing)
on the day (object of نَبْطِشُ - we seize)
we seize/attack violently (happening in يَوْمَ - on the Day)
the greatest, the biggest (feminine) (describes ٱلْبَطْشَةَ/the seizure)
those who take revenge (subject of إِنَّا)
before them (refers to the people mentioned before in the ayah)
people, folk (as the object being tested)
to me (connected to أَدُّوٓا۟ - deliver/hand over)
indeed I (subject of ءَاتِيكُم - I bring you)
I (will) bring to you all (addressing the disbelievers)
and indeed I (who sought refuge with my Lord)
I sought refuge (from تَرْجُمُونِ - you stoning me)
by/with my Lord (seeking protection with عُذْتُ)
and your (all of you) Lord (connected to عُذْتُ - I seek refuge)
and then he called upon (his رَبَّهُ)
that/indeed (introduces what he called to his Lord about)
these ones (plural, pointing to قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ - criminal people)
so travel at night! (as a command)
with my servants (object of فَأَسْرِ - travel by night)
at night (describes when فَأَسْرِ/travel by night happens)
indeed you all (being addressed by مُّتَّبَعُونَ)
ones who are being pursued (by فرعون/Pharaoh)
and leave! (connected to next word البحر)
in a state of calmness/stillness (describing how to leave the sea)
how many/much (asking about جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ - gardens and springs)
and a place of standing (genitive, following وَزُرُوعٍ)
and a blessing (that they were enjoying)
ones who are enjoying/happy (in accusative case)
a people (object of أَوْرَثْنٰهَا - we made inherit it)
others (being acted upon by أَوْرَثْنٰهَا - we gave it as inheritance)
she wept (subject of heaven and earth)
and the earth (subject of بَكَتْ - wept)
those who are given time (object of كانوا)
from (connecting فِرْعَوْنَ to what comes after)
the ones who waste/exceed limits (after مِنَ)
with knowledge (relating to اخْتَرْنٰهُمْ/We chose them)
from (with emphasis, connecting to next word)
what/that which (connects to فِيهِ - in it)
these ones (subject of لَيَقُولُونَ - they are saying)
if (introducing the statement 'it is only our first death')
except/only (excluding other deaths besides مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ)
among those who are brought back to life
with our fathers (object of فَأْتُوا - bring)
Are they? (asking about the people mentioned before)
people (subject of أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ - are they better)
of a Tubba (Yemeni king) (part of قَوْمُ - people of)
from (connecting قَبْلِ with what comes before it)
and not/what (connects to خَلَقْنَا - we created)
the heavens (possessed by/connected to something after it)
and the earth (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)
and what (makes the statement 'We did not create the heavens and earth' negative)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
players/those who act without purpose (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)
except (excluding what comes after from 'We did not create them' before it)
with/by the truth (describes how مَا خَلَقْنٰهُمَآ was done)
but truly/certainly (contrasts with previous statement إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ)
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
the separation/decision (part of يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ - Day of Decision)
their appointed time (subject of يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ)
all together (describing the group in يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ)
he makes (someone) without need (subject: يَوْمَ - Day)
any protector/helper at all (doer of يُغْنِى)
he was merciful (subject of إِلَّا مَن)
Allah (subject of رَّحِمَ - the one who had mercy)
indeed He (referring to Allah in هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The Mighty One (one of Allah's names)
the extremely sinful one (food of طَعَامُ)
it boils violently (like كَٱلْمُهْلِ - like molten metal)
like boiling (of الْحَمِيمِ - the scalding fluid)
the boiling hot water (like كَغَلْىِ - like boiling)
and drag him roughly! (command to group)
to the middle, to the center (of الْجَحِيمِ - the Hellfire)
from (connects عَذَابِ to what comes before it)
the intensely hot water (object of مِنْ عَذَابِ - from the punishment of)
taste! (command to one person, said mockingly to the arrogant person in Hell)
indeed you (being mocked by ذُقْ - taste!)
you (speaking to one male, subject of ٱلْعَزِيزُ)
The Noble, Generous One (used sarcastically in this ayah to mock the person who thought they were noble and mighty)
this (pointing to something nearby) (subject of مَا)
that which (refers to what is being doubted in كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ)
you all were (referring to what you used to doubt)
the God-fearing ones (who are in مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ - a secure position)
a place of standing (location in أَمِينٍ secure)
they put on (clothing) (subject of مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ - facing each other)
of/from (describing what يَلْبَسُونَ 'they wear' is made from)
those facing each other (describes the people wearing garments)
like that, in that way (describing how وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم 'We will pair them' happens)
and we married them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
with companions of beautiful eyes (in a general sense)
any fruit (in a series of blessings)
ones who are safe (describing the believers in Paradise)
they taste/experience (referring to the people of Paradise)
in it (referring to Paradise mentioned earlier)
the death (object of يَذُوقُونَ - they taste)
except/but (connects to لَا يَذُوقُونَ - they will not taste)
punishment (object of وَقَىٰهُمْ - protected them from)
as a favor (from رَّبِّكَ - your Lord)
that, that one (pointing to something far)
The Magnificent One (describing الْفَوْزُ - the triumph)
We made it easy (referring to the Quran)
with your tongue/language (used to make يَسَّرْنٰهُ easier)
perhaps they/so that they (subject of يَتَذَكَّرُونَ)
they reflect deeply (on لَعَلَّهُمْ 'so that they')
ones who are waiting and watching (subject of فَٱرْتَقِبْ)
